user\nmem.forget_all(tags=[\"user_123\"])\nmem.delete_user_data(user_id=\"user_123\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Data Portability"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Export in standard formats\nmem.export(format=\"json\")   # Machine-readable\nmem.export(format=\"csv\")    # Spreadsheet-friendly\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"PII Handling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not automatically detect or redact PII. Best practices:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Tag PII-containing memories: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tags=[\"pii\"]"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Use encryption for sensitive data"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Implement retention policies for PII"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Audit access to PII-tagged memories"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Privacy by Default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"local_embeddings=True"}]," and no cloud features enabled, Mnemosyne operates entirely offline.
